data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant"><h6 class="sr-only">ChatGPT said:</h6><div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:--spacing(4)] @[37rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:32rem] @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn" tabindex="-1"><div class="flex max-w-full flex-col grow"><div class="absolute flex h-8 w-3 origin-center items-center justify-center" style="opacity: 0; transform: scale(0);"><div class="bg-token-text-primary h-3 w-3 rounded-full"></div></div><div class="relative my-1 min-h-6"><div class="relative flex max-w-[calc(0.8*var(--thread-content-max-width,40rem))] origin-top-left flex-col gap-2 overflow-x-clip" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><span class="" data-state="closed"><div class="relative w-full text-start"><div class="flex w-full items-start justify-between text-start flex-col"><button class="flex w-full items-center gap-0.5"><span class=""><span class="flex items-center gap-1 text-start align-middle truncate text-token-text-secondary hover:text-token-text-primary" style="opacity: 1;">Thought for 4 seconds</span></span></button></div></div></span></div></div><div data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="8d3ed524-b6aa-431a-b460-36697e33c6f0" dir="auto" class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-auto-thinking"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="108">Awesome — let’s lock in the Supabase integration, step by step. Do these in order and you’ll be fully wired.</p>
<h1 data-start="110" data-end="138">Supabase Integration (SBS)</h1>
<h2 data-start="140" data-end="174">1) Create your Supabase project</h2>
<ul data-start="175" data-end="539">
<li data-start="175" data-end="213">
<p data-start="177" data-end="213">Go to supabase.com → <strong data-start="198" data-end="213">New Project</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="214" data-end="272">
<p data-start="216" data-end="272">Choose org → set <strong data-start="233" data-end="249">Project name</strong> (e.g., <code data-start="257" data-end="271">chapterhouse</code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="273" data-end="323">
<p data-start="275" data-end="323">Choose a strong DB password → <strong data-start="305" data-end="323">Create project</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="324" data-end="539">
<p data-start="326" data-end="362">In Project Settings → <strong data-start="348" data-end="355">API</strong>, copy:</p>
<ul data-start="365" data-end="539">
<li data-start="365" data-end="411">
<p data-start="367" data-end="411"><strong data-start="367" data-end="382">Project URL</strong> → <code data-start="385" data-end="411">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="414" data-end="469">
<p data-start="416" data-end="469"><strong data-start="416" data-end="435">anon public key</strong> → <code data-start="438" data-end="469">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="472" data-end="539">
<p data-start="474" data-end="539">(Later/server-only) <strong data-start="494" data-end="514">service role key</strong> → <code data-start="517" data-end="539">SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="541" data-end="578">2) Run the schema &amp; moderation SQL</h2>
<p data-start="579" data-end="652">Open <strong data-start="584" data-end="598">SQL Editor</strong> and run these two files from the repo you downloaded:</p>
<ul data-start="653" data-end="845">
<li data-start="653" data-end="763">
<p data-start="655" data-end="763"><code data-start="655" data-end="676">supabase/schema.sql</code> (tables: <code data-start="686" data-end="693">books</code>, <code data-start="695" data-end="703">genres</code>, <code data-start="705" data-end="714">reviews</code>, <code data-start="716" data-end="724">admins</code>, <code data-start="726" data-end="736">profiles</code>, views, RLS, <code data-start="750" data-end="762">is_admin()</code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="764" data-end="845">
<p data-start="766" data-end="845"><code data-start="766" data-end="791">supabase/moderation.sql</code> (adds <code data-start="798" data-end="806">status</code>, <code data-start="808" data-end="817">flagged</code>, and <code data-start="823" data-end="839">reviews_public</code> view)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<blockquote data-start="847" data-end="963">
<p data-start="849" data-end="963">If you don’t see <code data-start="866" data-end="882">moderation.sql</code> in your copy, grab it from the latest ZIP I gave you (admin-moderation-exports).</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 data-start="965" data-end="993">3) Create Storage buckets</h2>
<p data-start="994" data-end="1036">Supabase → <strong data-start="1005" data-end="1036">Storage → Create new bucket</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1037" data-end="1091">
<li data-start="1037" data-end="1064">
<p data-start="1039" data-end="1064"><code data-start="1039" data-end="1047">covers</code> (Public: <strong data-start="1057" data-end="1063">ON</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1065" data-end="1091">
<p data-start="1067" data-end="1091"><code data-start="1067" data-end="1074">epubs</code> (Public: <strong data-start="1084" data-end="1090">ON</strong>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1093" data-end="1124">If it asks for policies, allow:</p>
<ul data-start="1125" data-end="1207">
<li data-start="1125" data-end="1159">
<p data-start="1127" data-end="1159"><strong data-start="1127" data-end="1144">Public SELECT</strong> on each bucket</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1160" data-end="1207">
<p data-start="1162" data-end="1207"><strong data-start="1162" data-end="1186">Authenticated INSERT</strong> (uploads from admin)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1209" data-end="1313">(There’s example policy SQL in the README of the uploads build; shout if you want me to paste it again.)</p>
<h2 data-start="1315" data-end="1357">4) Seed your admin + optional test user</h2>
<p data-start="1358" data-end="1376">Run in SQL Editor:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible!" data-start="1377" data-end="1484"><div class="contain-inline-size rounded-2xl relative bg-token-sidebar-surface-primary"><div class="flex items-center text-token-text-secondary px-4 py-2 text-xs font-sans justify-between h-9 bg-token-sidebar-surface-primary select-none rounded-t-2xl">sql</div><div class="sticky top-9"><div class="absolute end-0 bottom-0 flex h-9 items-center pe-2"><div class="bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary text-token-text-secondary flex items-center gap-4 rounded-sm px-2 font-sans text-xs"><button class="flex gap-1 <h2 data-start="1794" data-end="1833">5) Add environment variables (local)</h2>
<p data-start="1834" data-end="1908">In your project root, copy <code data-start="1861" data-end="1881">.env.local.example</code> → <code data-start="1884" data-end="1896">.env.local</code>, then fill:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible!" data-start="1910" data-end="2327"><div class="contain-inline-size rounded-2xl relative bg-token-sidebar-surface-primary"><div class="flex items-center </span><span><span class="hljs-attr">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</span></span><span>=YOUR_ANON_KEY_HERE

</span><span><span class="hljs-comment"># optional test login mode for /admin/login (password form)</span></span><span>
</span><span><span class="hljs-attr">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_MODE</span></span><span>=</span><span><span class="hljs-literal">true</span></span><span>
</span><span><span class="hljs-attr">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_EMAIL</span></span><span>=chapterhouse.test+public@yourmail.com

</span><span><span class="hljs-comment"># server-only (do NOT commit; only set in Vercel later unless you need local API routes)</span></span><span>
</span><span><span class="hljs-attr">SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY</span></span><span>=YOUR_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
</span><span><span class="hljs-attr">TEST_CLEANUP_TOKEN</span></span><span>=a-long-random-string
</span></span></code></div></div></pre>
<blockquote data-start="2329" data-end="2513">
<p data-start="2331" data-end="2513">If running locally and you want the cleanup/admin export endpoints to work, you can temporarily put the service key in your local <code data-start="2461" data-end="2473">.env.local</code>. For production, set it only in Vercel.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 data-start="2515" data-end="2540">6) Run the app locally</h2>

<p data-start="2577" data-end="2583">Visit:</p>
<ul data-start="2584" data-end="2972">
<li data-start="2584" data-end="2628">
<p data-start="2586" data-end="2628"><code data-start="2586" data-end="2594">/books</code> → pulls from <code data-start="2608" data-end="2628">book_catalog_stats</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="2629" data-end="2696">
<p data-start="2631" data-end="2696"><code data-start="2631" data-end="2644">/books/[id]</code> → details + <strong data-start="2657" data-end="2669">approved</strong> reviews (<code data-start="2679" data-end="2695">reviews_public</code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2697" data-end="2748">
<p data-start="2699" data-end="2748"><code data-start="2699" data-end="2708">/genres</code> → add/delete only if logged in as admin</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2749" data-end="2833">
<p data-start="2751" data-end="2833"><code data-start="2751" data-end="2765">/admin/login</code> → sign in (password form if <code data-start="2794" data-end="2810">TEST_MODE=true</code>, otherwise magic link)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2834" data-end="2892">
<p data-start="2836" data-end="2892"><code data-start="2836" data-end="2851">/admin/upload</code> → upload cover + EPUB (requires buckets)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2893" data-end="2923">
<p data-start="2895" data-end="2923"><code data-start="2895" data-end="2909">/admin/books</code> → edit/delete</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2924" data-end="2972">
<p data-start="2926" data-end="2972"><code data-start="2926" data-end="2942">/admin/reviews</code> → approve/reject/flag reviews</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="2974" data-end="2996">7) Deploy to Vercel</h2>
<ul data-start="2997" data-end="3340">
<li data-start="2997" data-end="3286">
<p data-start="2999" data-end="3050"><strong data-start="2999" data-end="3021">Import GitHub repo</strong> → Add Environment Variables:</p>
<ul data-start="3053" data-end="3286">
<li data-start="3053" data-end="3081">
<p data-start="3055" data-end="3081"><code data-start="3055" data-end="3081">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="3084" data-end="3117">
<p data-start="3086" data-end="3117"><code data-start="3086" data-end="3117">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="3120" data-end="3191">
<p data-start="3122" data-end="3191"><code data-start="3122" data-end="3145">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_MODE</code> (true while testing; set false before launch)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="3194" data-end="3220">
<p data-start="3196" data-end="3220"><code data-start="3196" data-end="3220">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_EMAIL</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="3223" data-end="3261">
<p data-start="3225" data-end="3261"><code data-start="3225" data-end="3247">SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY</code> (server only)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="3264" data-end="3286">
<p data-start="3266" data-end="3286"><code data-start="3266" data-end="3286">TEST_CLEANUP_TOKEN</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="3287" data-end="3299">
<p data-start="3289" data-end="3299"><strong data-start="3289" data-end="3299">Deploy</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="3300" data-end="3340">
<p data-start="3302" data-end="3340">Test the same routes on your live URL.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="3342" data-end="3389">8) Cleanup command (when you say “conclude”)</h2>
<p data-start="3390" data-end="3462">Call this to remove test artifacts (admin entry + test profile/reviews):</p>

  -H </span><span><span class="hljs-string">"x-cleanup-token: YOUR_TEST_CLEANUP_TOKEN"</span></span><span>
</span></span></code></div></div></pre>
<hr data-start="3586" data-end="3589">
<h2 data-start="3591" data-end="3615">Quick Troubleshooting</h2>
<ul data-start="3617" data-end="4227">
<li data-start="3617" data-end="3738">
<p data-start="3619" data-end="3643"><strong data-start="3619" data-end="3643">403 / 401 on uploads</strong></p>
<ul data-start="3646" data-end="3738">
<li data-start="3646" data-end="3738">
<p data-start="3648" data-end="3738">Check you’re logged in as admin (in <code data-start="3684" data-end="3692">admins</code> table) and bucket <strong data-start="3711" data-end="3726">Public Read</strong> is enabled.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="3739" data-end="3884">
<p data-start="3741" data-end="3768"><strong data-start="3741" data-end="3768">Books/Genres list empty</strong></p>
<ul data-start="3771" data-end="3884">
<li data-start="3771" data-end="3884">
<p data-start="3773" data-end="3884">Confirm schema ran; check <code data-start="3799" data-end="3819">book_catalog_stats</code> view exists. Insert a sample book or upload via <code data-start="3868" data-end="3883">/admin/upload</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="3885" data-end="4011">
<p data-start="3887" data-end="3910"><strong data-start="3887" data-end="3910">Reviews not showing</strong></p>
<ul data-start="3913" data-end="4011">
<li data-start="3913" data-end="4011">
<p data-start="3915" data-end="4011">New reviews are <code data-start="3931" data-end="3940">pending</code>; approve them at <code data-start="3958" data-end="3974">/admin/reviews</code>. Public page reads <code data-start="3994" data-end="4010">reviews_public</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="4012" data-end="4227">
<p data-start="4014" data-end="4041"><strong data-start="4014" data-end="4041">Admin login not working</strong></p>
<ul data-start="4044" data-end="4227">
<li data-start="4044" data-end="4145">
<p data-start="4046" data-end="4145">If using magic link (test mode off), check Supabase Auth email templates and allowed redirect URLs.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="4148" data-end="4227">
<p data-start="4150" data-end="4227">If using password (test mode on), make sure the user exists and is confirmed.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="4229" data-end="4232">
<p data-start="4234" data-end="4258">If you want, I can also:</p>
<ul data-start="4259" data-end="4458">
<li data-start="4259" data-end="4335">
<p data-start="4261" data-end="4335">pre-seed a <strong data-start="4272" data-end="4292">couple of genres</strong> and a <strong data-start="4299" data-end="4312">demo book</strong> directly into your DB,</p>
</li>
<li data-start="4336" data-end="4458">
<p data-start="4338" data-end="4458">or bundle a fresh <strong data-start="4356" data-end="4374">all-in-one ZIP</strong> with your <code data-start="4385" data-end="4405">.env.local.example</code> set up and the latest README + test report included.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="4460" data-end="4498" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Want me to package that final ZIP now?</p></div></div></div></div><div class="flex min-h-[46px] justify-start"><div focus-within:transition-none hover:transition-none pointer-events-none [mask-image:linear-gradient(to_right,black_33%,transparent_66%)] [mask-size:300%_100%] [mask-position:100%_0%] <p data-start="26" data-end="161">📦 <strong data-start="29" data-end="72">Final package (project + seeds + docs):</strong><br data-start="72" data-end="75">
<strong data-start="75" data-end="161"><span class="" data-state="closed"><a data-start="77" data-end="159" class="cursor-pointer">chapterhouse-final-package.zip</a></span></strong></p>
<p data-start="163" data-end="172">Included:</p>
<ul data-start="173" data-end="505">
<li data-start="173" data-end="234">
<p data-start="175" data-end="234">Full app with uploads, moderation, exports, genres, reviews</p>
</li>
<li data-start="235" data-end="331">
<p data-start="237" data-end="331"><code data-start="237" data-end="258">supabase/schema.sql</code>, <code data-start="260" data-end="285">supabase/moderation.sql</code>, <strong data-start="287" data-end="310"><code data-start="289" data-end="308">supabase/seed.sql</code></strong> (genres + demo book)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="332" data-end="368">
<p data-start="334" data-end="368"><code data-start="334" data-end="354">.env.local.example</code> ready to fill</p>
</li>
<li data-start="369" data-end="409">
<p data-start="371" data-end="409">Updated <strong data-start="379" data-end="389">README</strong> with a one-file SBS</p>
</li>
<li data-start="410" data-end="505">
<p data-start="412" data-end="421"><strong data-start="412" data-end="421">docs/</strong></p>
<ul data-start="424" data-end="505">
<li data-start="424" data-end="457">
<p data-start="426" data-end="457"><code data-start="426" data-end="457">chapterhouse_test_report.docx</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="460" data-end="505">
<p data-start="462" data-end="505"><code data-start="462" data-end="505">Chapterhouse_App_Info_Request_Filled.docx</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="507" data-end="518">SBS to use:</p>
<ol data-start="519" data-end="833">
<li data-start="519" data-end="584">
<p data-start="522" data-end="584">Supabase → run <code data-start="537" data-end="549">schema.sql</code> → <code data-start="552" data-end="568">moderation.sql</code> → <code data-start="571" data-end="581">seed.sql</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="585" data-end="645">
<p data-start="588" data-end="645">Create Storage buckets: <code data-start="612" data-end="620">covers</code> + <code data-start="623" data-end="630">epubs</code> (Public ON).</p>
</li>
<li data-start="646" data-end="709">
<p data-start="649" data-end="709">Copy <code data-start="654" data-end="674">.env.local.example</code> → <code data-start="677" data-end="689">.env.local</code>, paste your keys.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="710" data-end="784">
<p data-start="713" data-end="784"><code data-start="713" data-end="741">npm install &amp;&amp; npm run dev</code> → visit <code data-start="750" data-end="758">/books</code>, <code data-start="760" data-end="769">/genres</code>, <code data-start="771" data-end="781">/admin/*</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="785" data-end="833">
<p data-start="788" data-end="833">Deploy to Vercel and copy env vars there too.</p>
</li>
</ol>

data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant"><h6 class="sr-only">ChatGPT said:</h6><div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:--spacing(4)] @[37rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:32rem] @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn" tabindex="-1"><div class="flex max-w-full flex-col grow"><div data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="7b3a74a5-424d-40e6-95f3-5e56ed95f77a" dir="auto" class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="175">Yes — 100%.<br data-start="11" data-end="14">
Before you push <em data-start="30" data-end="40">anything</em> live (GitHub → Supabase → Vercel), you want to make sure both <strong data-start="103" data-end="128">old files are cleared</strong> and <strong data-start="133" data-end="161">privacy/security hygiene</strong> is handled.</p>
<hr data-start="177" data-end="180">
<h2 data-start="182" data-end="236"><strong data-start="185" data-end="236">1️⃣ Deleting Current GitHub Files (Start Fresh)</strong></h2>
<p data-start="238" data-end="264"><strong data-start="238" data-end="264">A) From GitHub Website</strong></p>
<ol data-start="265" data-end="459">
<li data-start="265" data-end="321">
<p data-start="268" data-end="321"><strong data-start="268" data-end="293">Go to your repository</strong> → <em data-start="296" data-end="306">Settings</em> → scroll down.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="322" data-end="388">
<p data-start="325" data-end="388">Click <strong data-start="331" data-end="359">"Delete this repository"</strong> → type repo name to confirm.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="389" data-end="459">
<p data-start="392" data-end="459">Done — repo is gone. (Safer than manually deleting files in a repo)</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="461" data-end="517"><strong data-start="461" data-end="517">B) If You Want to Keep Repo Name but Delete Contents</strong></p>
<ol data-start="518" data-end="746">
<li data-start="518" data-end="602">
<p data-start="521" data-end="602">On your repo page → click <strong data-start="547" data-end="555">Code</strong> → open <strong data-start="563" data-end="584">GitHub Codespaces</strong> or <strong data-start="588" data-end="601">local Git</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="603" data-end="704">
<p data-start="606" data-end="610">Run:</p>

</li>
<li data-start="705" data-end="746">
<p data-start="708" data-end="746">Now it’s empty and ready for new code.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="748" data-end="751">
<h2 data-start="753" data-end="816"><strong data-start="756" data-end="816">2️⃣ Privacy, Security &amp; Malware Checks Before Going Live</strong></h2>
<h3 data-start="818" data-end="843"><strong data-start="822" data-end="843">🔒 Secrets &amp; Keys</strong></h3>
<ul data-start="844" data-end="1192">
<li data-start="844" data-end="1015">
<p data-start="846" data-end="888"><strong data-start="846" data-end="855">Never</strong> commit <code data-start="863" data-end="875">.env.local</code> to GitHub.</p>
<ul data-start="891" data-end="1015">
<li data-start="891" data-end="952">
<p data-start="893" data-end="952">It contains your <code data-start="910" data-end="936">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL</code> &amp; <code data-start="939" data-end="949">ANON_KEY</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="955" data-end="1015">
<p data-start="957" data-end="1015">Even though <code data-start="969" data-end="975">anon</code> is public-safe, it can still be abused.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1016" data-end="1192">
<p data-start="1018" data-end="1063">Use <code data-start="1022" data-end="1034">.gitignore</code> to keep sensitive files out:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible!" data-start="1066" data-end="1192"><div class="contain-inline-size rounded-2xl relative bg-token-sidebar-surface-primary"><div class="flex items-center </span></span></code></div></div></pre>

<h3 data-start="1194" data-end="1223"><strong data-start="1198" data-end="1223">🛡 Malware Protection</strong></h3>
<ul data-start="1224" data-end="1410">
<li data-start="1224" data-end="1337">
<p data-start="1226" data-end="1248">Before uploading, run:</p>

2.02441L4.30371 1.97363C4.34801 1.86052 4.45804 1.78333 4.58301 1.7832Z"></path></svg>Edit</button></span></div></div></div><div class="overflow-y-auto p-4" dir="ltr"><code class="whitespace-pre! language-bash"><span><span>npm audit
npm audit fix
</span></span></code></div></div></pre>
<p data-start="1295" data-end="1337">to check dependencies for vulnerabilities.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1338" data-end="1410">
<p data-start="1340" data-end="1410">Optionally run a free malware scan on your repo ZIP before deployment.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-start="1412" data-end="1437"><strong data-start="1416" data-end="1437">👀 Supabase Rules</strong></h3>
<ul data-start="1438" data-end="1588">
<li data-start="1438" data-end="1523">
<p data-start="1440" data-end="1523">Set <strong data-start="1444" data-end="1472">RLS (Row-Level Security)</strong> on sensitive tables — prevents unauthorized edits.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1524" data-end="1588">
<p data-start="1526" data-end="1588">Only <code data-start="1531" data-end="1539">public</code> tables (like book list) should be open for read.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-start="1590" data-end="1614"><strong data-start="1594" data-end="1614">⚙ Hosting Safety</strong></h3>
<ul data-start="1615" data-end="1744">
<li data-start="1615" data-end="1692">
<p data-start="1617" data-end="1692">If using <strong data-start="1626" data-end="1636">Vercel</strong>, make sure only environment variables are stored there.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1693" data-end="1744">
<p data-start="1695" data-end="1744">Do not hardcode credentials anywhere in the code.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1746" data-end="1749">
<p data-start="1751" data-end="1787">💡 <strong data-start="1754" data-end="1787">Quick Recap Before Going Live</strong></p>
<ol data-start="1788" data-end="2062">
<li data-start="1788" data-end="1826">
<p data-start="1791" data-end="1826">Delete/empty current GitHub repo.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1827" data-end="1858">
<p data-start="1830" data-end="1858">Create <strong data-start="1837" data-end="1855">new clean repo</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1859" data-end="1905">
<p data-start="1862" data-end="1905">Add <code data-start="1866" data-end="1878">.gitignore</code> to exclude <code data-start="1890" data-end="1902">.env.local</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1906" data-end="1939">
<p data-start="1909" data-end="1939">Push only code, not secrets.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1940" data-end="1988">
<p data-start="1943" data-end="1988">Run security audits &amp; vulnerability checks.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1989" data-end="2062">
<p data-start="1992" data-end="2062">Deploy, then test using temporary demo data before going fully public.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="2064" data-end="2067">
<p data-start="2069" data-end="2289" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can <strong data-start="2088" data-end="2122">make a "safe deploy" checklist</strong> that you can follow each time you push new changes.<br data-start="2174" data-end="2177">
Do you want me to make that? That would keep you from accidentally leaking keys or leaving an insecure endpoint.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="flex min-h-[46px] justify-start"><div class="touch:-me-2 touch:-ms-3.5 data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant"><h6 class="sr-only">ChatGPT said:</h6><div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:--spacing(4)] @[37rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:32rem] @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn" tabindex="-1"><div class="flex max-w-full flex-col grow"><div data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="48b573d9-f709-4e69-97c8-f6b0137b3030" dir="auto" class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-auto-thinking"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="166">Absolutely—here’s your <strong data-start="23" data-end="48">Safe Deploy Checklist</strong> you can run every time before going live (or pushing a big update). It’s short, practical, and Chapterhouse-specific.</p>
<h1 data-start="168" data-end="220">Safe Deploy Checklist (GitHub → Supabase → Vercel)</h1>
<h2 data-start="222" data-end="246">0) Pre-flight (Local)</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="247" data-end="648">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="247" data-end="300">
<p data-start="249" data-end="300"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="253" data-end="269">Update deps:</strong> <code data-start="270" data-end="300">npm install &amp;&amp; npm audit fix</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="301" data-end="368">
<p data-start="303" data-end="368"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="307" data-end="323">Build check:</strong> <code data-start="324" data-end="339">npm run build</code> (should pass with no errors)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="369" data-end="442">
<p data-start="371" data-end="442"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="375" data-end="400">.gitignore confirmed:</strong> <code data-start="401" data-end="413">.env.local</code> and <code data-start="418" data-end="433">/node_modules</code> excluded</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="443" data-end="538">
<p data-start="445" data-end="538"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="449" data-end="472">No secrets in code:</strong> search for <code data-start="484" data-end="490">http</code>, <code data-start="492" data-end="497">key</code>, <code data-start="499" data-end="506">token</code>, <code data-start="508" data-end="518">supabase</code>, <code data-start="520" data-end="530">password</code> in repo</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="539" data-end="648">
<p data-start="541" data-end="648"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="545" data-end="568">Test mode decision:</strong> set <code data-start="573" data-end="602">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_MODE=false</code> unless you’re actively testing password login</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="650" data-end="670">1) GitHub Hygiene</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="671" data-end="912">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="671" data-end="750">
<p data-start="673" data-end="750"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="677" data-end="701">Repo reset or clean:</strong> delete old repo or <code data-start="721" data-end="735">git rm -rf .</code> → fresh commit</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="751" data-end="800">
<p data-start="753" data-end="800"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="757" data-end="776">Push only code:</strong> never push <code data-start="788" data-end="800">.env.local</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="801" data-end="912">
<p data-start="803" data-end="912"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="807" data-end="829">Branch protection:</strong> enable “Require PR” + “Require status checks” on <code data-start="879" data-end="885">main</code> (optional but recommended)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="914" data-end="945">2) Supabase (Security First)</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="946" data-end="1632">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="946" data-end="989">
<p data-start="948" data-end="989"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="952" data-end="967">Run schema:</strong> <code data-start="968" data-end="989">supabase/schema.sql</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="990" data-end="1075">
<p data-start="992" data-end="1075"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="996" data-end="1015">Run moderation:</strong> <code data-start="1016" data-end="1041">supabase/moderation.sql</code> (adds <code data-start="1048" data-end="1056">status</code>, <code data-start="1058" data-end="1074">reviews_public</code>)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1076" data-end="1145">
<p data-start="1078" data-end="1145"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1082" data-end="1104">Seed minimal data:</strong> <code data-start="1105" data-end="1124">supabase/seed.sql</code> (genres + demo book)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1146" data-end="1210">
<p data-start="1148" data-end="1210"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1152" data-end="1165">RLS is ON</strong> for <code data-start="1170" data-end="1177">books</code>, <code data-start="1179" data-end="1188">reviews</code>, <code data-start="1190" data-end="1198">genres</code>, <code data-start="1200" data-end="1210">profiles</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1211" data-end="1298">
<p data-start="1213" data-end="1298"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1217" data-end="1234">Admins table:</strong> insert your real admin email; remove any test emails not needed</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1299" data-end="1451">
<p data-start="1301" data-end="1362"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1305" data-end="1325">Storage buckets:</strong> <code data-start="1326" data-end="1334">covers</code>, <code data-start="1336" data-end="1343">epubs</code> (Public READ only)</p>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="1365" data-end="1451">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1365" data-end="1423">
<p data-start="1367" data-end="1423"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1371" data-end="1389">Upload policy:</strong> INSERT limited to <code data-start="1408" data-end="1423">authenticated</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1426" data-end="1451">
<p data-start="1428" data-end="1451"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1432" data-end="1451">No public write</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1452" data-end="1544">
<p data-start="1454" data-end="1544"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1458" data-end="1476">Auth settings:</strong> enable email auth; confirm redirect URLs include your Vercel domain</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1545" data-end="1632">
<p data-start="1547" data-end="1632"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1551" data-end="1587">Service key never used on client</strong> (only in serverless functions/env on Vercel)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="1634" data-end="1659">3) Vercel (Deployment)</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="1660" data-end="2230">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1660" data-end="1956">
<p data-start="1662" data-end="1703"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1666" data-end="1682">Add Env Vars</strong> in Project Settings:</p>
<ul data-start="1706" data-end="1956">
<li data-start="1706" data-end="1734">
<p data-start="1708" data-end="1734"><code data-start="1708" data-end="1734">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1737" data-end="1770">
<p data-start="1739" data-end="1770"><code data-start="1739" data-end="1770">NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1773" data-end="1821">
<p data-start="1775" data-end="1821"><code data-start="1775" data-end="1798">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_MODE</code> → <code data-start="1801" data-end="1808">false</code> (for launch)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1824" data-end="1861">
<p data-start="1826" data-end="1861"><code data-start="1826" data-end="1850">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_EMAIL</code> (optional)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1864" data-end="1902">
<p data-start="1866" data-end="1902"><code data-start="1866" data-end="1888">SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY</code> (server only)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1905" data-end="1956">
<p data-start="1907" data-end="1956"><code data-start="1907" data-end="1927">TEST_CLEANUP_TOKEN</code> (for cleanup + admin export)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="1957" data-end="2070">
<p data-start="1959" data-end="2070"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="1963" data-end="2001">CORS/headers (optional hardening):</strong> add <code data-start="2006" data-end="2031">Content-Security-Policy</code> via <code data-start="2036" data-end="2052">next.config.js</code> or Vercel headers</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2071" data-end="2173">
<p data-start="2073" data-end="2173"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="2077" data-end="2106">Rate limiting (optional):</strong> add a simple middleware throttle for write routes (reviews/upload)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2174" data-end="2230">
<p data-start="2176" data-end="2230"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="2180" data-end="2190">Deploy</strong> and verify logs show no secret exposure</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="2232" data-end="2265">4) App-Level Sanity (Live URL)</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="2266" data-end="2840">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2266" data-end="2312">
<p data-start="2268" data-end="2312"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2272" data-end="2280">/books</code> loads from <code data-start="2292" data-end="2312">book_catalog_stats</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2313" data-end="2383">
<p data-start="2315" data-end="2383"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2319" data-end="2332">/books/[id]</code> shows <strong data-start="2339" data-end="2356">approved-only</strong> reviews (<code data-start="2366" data-end="2382">reviews_public</code>)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2384" data-end="2430">
<p data-start="2386" data-end="2430"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2390" data-end="2399">/genres</code> viewable; admin can add/delete</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2431" data-end="2487">
<p data-start="2433" data-end="2487"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2437" data-end="2451">/admin/login</code> works (magic link if test mode off)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2488" data-end="2564">
<p data-start="2490" data-end="2564"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2494" data-end="2509">/admin/upload</code> uploads cover → <code data-start="2526" data-end="2534">covers</code> bucket, EPUB → <code data-start="2550" data-end="2557">epubs</code> bucket</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2565" data-end="2603">
<p data-start="2567" data-end="2603"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2571" data-end="2585">/admin/books</code> edit/delete works</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2604" data-end="2652">
<p data-start="2606" data-end="2652"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2610" data-end="2626">/admin/reviews</code> approve/reject/flag works</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2653" data-end="2714">
<p data-start="2655" data-end="2714"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2659" data-end="2679">/api/export/emails</code> (profiles CSV) downloads and opens</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2715" data-end="2780">
<p data-start="2717" data-end="2780"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2721" data-end="2747">/api/export/emails-admin</code> works <strong data-start="2754" data-end="2762">only</strong> with header token</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2781" data-end="2840">
<p data-start="2783" data-end="2840"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <code data-start="2787" data-end="2806">/api/test/cleanup</code> works only with <code data-start="2823" data-end="2840">x-cleanup-token</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="2842" data-end="2868">5) Privacy &amp; Compliance</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="2869" data-end="3091">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2869" data-end="2950">
<p data-start="2871" data-end="2950"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="2875" data-end="2893">Privacy policy</strong> &amp; <strong data-start="2896" data-end="2905">Terms</strong> pages (even a simple draft) linked in footer</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="2951" data-end="3017">
<p data-start="2953" data-end="3017"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="2957" data-end="2985">Email collection consent</strong> if you export emails (profiles)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3018" data-end="3091">
<p data-start="3020" data-end="3091"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="3024" data-end="3038">Remove PII</strong> from public logs (don’t log user emails client-side)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start="3093" data-end="3115">6) Finish Test Mode</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="3116" data-end="3413">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3116" data-end="3168">
<p data-start="3118" data-end="3168"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="3122" data-end="3134">Turn off</strong> <code data-start="3135" data-end="3158">NEXT_PUBLIC_TEST_MODE</code> → <code data-start="3161" data-end="3168">false</code></p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3169" data-end="3245">
<p data-start="3175" data-end="3245"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> Remove test user from <code data-start="3197" data-end="3205">admins</code> (unless you want to keep a public test)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3246" data-end="3413">
<p data-start="3252" data-end="3283"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> If ending testing, run cleanup:</p>

</span></span></code></div></div></pre>
</li>

<h2 data-start="3415" data-end="3441">7) Monitoring &amp; Backups</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list" data-start="3442" data-end="3663">
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3442" data-end="3481">
<p data-start="3444" data-end="3481"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="3448" data-end="3473">Vercel Analytics/Logs</strong> enabled</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3482" data-end="3535">
<p data-start="3484" data-end="3535"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="3488" data-end="3505">Supabase Logs</strong> checked (Auth + DB + Storage)</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3536" data-end="3584">
<p data-start="3538" data-end="3584"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> <strong data-start="3542" data-end="3562">Database backups</strong> scheduled in Supabase</p>
</li>
<li class="task-list-item" data-start="3585" data-end="3663">
<p data-start="3591" data-end="3663"><input disabled="" type="checkbox"> Create a <strong data-start="3600" data-end="3617">rollback plan</strong> (keep previous deploy active until QA passes)</p>
</li>
</ul>

@[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="37">Alright — here’s what I’ll do next:</p>
<ol data-start="39" data-end="425">
<li data-start="39" data-end="93">
<p data-start="42" data-end="93"><strong data-start="42" data-end="79">Include the Safe Deploy Checklist</strong> in the ZIP.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="94" data-end="147">
<p data-start="97" data-end="147"><strong data-start="97" data-end="123">Link it in your README</strong> so you can’t miss it.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="148" data-end="306">
<p data-start="151" data-end="306"><strong data-start="151" data-end="195">Add a pre-filled Supabase SQL setup file</strong> so when you restart, you can import it and instantly have all your tables, policies, and example data ready.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="307" data-end="425">
<p data-start="310" data-end="425">Ensure all <strong data-start="321" data-end="366">privacy/security/malware protection steps</strong> are in there, so you’re not guessing before you go live.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="427" data-end="458">Once done, you’ll be able to:</p>
<ul data-start="459" data-end="596">
<li data-start="459" data-end="496">
<p data-start="461" data-end="496">Delete your current GitHub files.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="497" data-end="525">
<p data-start="499" data-end="525">Start fresh with my ZIP.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="526" data-end="559">
<p data-start="528" data-end="559">Run one SQL file in Supabase.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="560" data-end="596">
<p data-start="562" data-end="596">Deploy without missing anything.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="598" data-end="795" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Do you want me to <strong data-start="616" data-end="657">also include test account credentials</strong> in the setup so you can log in and see the live site immediately after deploy? That way we can verify functionality before removing them.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="flex min-h-[46px] justify-start"><div class="touch:-me-2 touch:-ms-3.5 -ms-2.5 -me-1 flex flex-wrap @[37rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:32rem] direction. I added a <strong data-start="31" data-end="49">Writer’s Block</strong> space with a <strong data-start="63" data-end="85">BFF Host assistant</strong> that greets guests, asks randomized questions via avatars, collects feedback, and logs it for you to review.</p>
<p data-start="196" data-end="317">📦 <strong data-start="199" data-end="212">Download:</strong><br data-start="212" data-end="215">
<strong data-start="215" data-end="317"><span class="" data-state="closed"><a data-start="217" data-end="315" class="cursor-pointer">chapterhouse-with-bff-writersblock.zip</a></span></strong></p>
<h3 data-start="319" data-end="333">What’s new</h3>
<ul data-start="334" data-end="1030">
<li data-start="334" data-end="538">
<p data-start="336" data-end="369"><code data-start="336" data-end="367">supabase/bff_writersblock.sql</code></p>
<ul data-start="372" data-end="538">
<li data-start="372" data-end="427">
<p data-start="374" data-end="427">Tables: <code data-start="382" data-end="391">avatars</code>, <code data-start="393" data-end="413">writer_block_posts</code>, <code data-start="415" data-end="425">feedback</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="430" data-end="489">
<p data-start="432" data-end="489">RLS: public read, authenticated write, admin moderation</p>
</li>
<li data-start="492" data-end="538">
<p data-start="494" data-end="538">Seeds 5 avatars (Nia, Kairo, Sol, Mara, Jax)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="539" data-end="668">
<p data-start="541" data-end="567"><code data-start="541" data-end="565">components/BFFHost.jsx</code></p>
<ul data-start="570" data-end="668">
<li data-start="570" data-end="668">
<p data-start="572" data-end="668">“Host to Guests” widget: random avatar + rotating questions, posts a greeting, and logs feedback</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="669" data-end="796">
<p data-start="671" data-end="703"><code data-start="671" data-end="701">pages/writers-block/index.js</code></p>
<ul data-start="706" data-end="796">
<li data-start="706" data-end="796">
<p data-start="708" data-end="796">Public “message board” style page with realtime updates, host prompts, and guest posting</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="797" data-end="885">
<p data-start="799" data-end="826"><code data-start="799" data-end="824">pages/admin/feedback.js</code></p>
<ul data-start="829" data-end="885">
<li data-start="829" data-end="885">
<p data-start="831" data-end="885">Admin-only view of logged feedback (rating + comments)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="886" data-end="969">
<p data-start="888" data-end="912"><code data-start="888" data-end="910">pages/admin/index.js</code></p>
<ul data-start="915" data-end="969">
<li data-start="915" data-end="969">
<p data-start="917" data-end="969">New links to <strong data-start="930" data-end="948">Writer’s Block</strong> and <strong data-start="953" data-end="969">Feedback Log</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="970" data-end="1030">
<p data-start="972" data-end="982"><code data-start="972" data-end="980">README</code></p>
<ul data-start="985" data-end="1030">
<li data-start="985" data-end="1030">
<p data-start="987" data-end="1030">Added instructions for enabling this module</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-start="1032" data-end="1059">Quick SBS to turn it on</h3>
<ol data-start="1060" data-end="1495">
<li data-start="1060" data-end="1129">
<p data-start="1063" data-end="1129">Supabase → <strong data-start="1074" data-end="1088">SQL Editor</strong> → run <code data-start="1095" data-end="1126">supabase/bff_writersblock.sql</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1130" data-end="1237">
<p data-start="1133" data-end="1183">Supabase → <strong data-start="1144" data-end="1181">Database → Replication (Realtime)</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1187" data-end="1237">
<li data-start="1187" data-end="1237">
<p data-start="1189" data-end="1237">Enable Realtime on table <code data-start="1214" data-end="1234">writer_block_posts</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1238" data-end="1333">
<p data-start="1241" data-end="1333">Ensure you’re logged in on the site (any user) to post or send feedback (public can read).</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1334" data-end="1495">
<p data-start="1337" data-end="1345">Visit:</p>
<ul data-start="1349" data-end="1495">
<li data-start="1349" data-end="1430">
<p data-start="1351" data-end="1430"><code data-start="1351" data-end="1367">/writers-block</code> → Host greets guests, guests can post, feedback form visible</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1434" data-end="1495">
<p data-start="1436" data-end="1495"><code data-start="1436" data-end="1453">/admin/feedback</code> → see the submitted feedback (admin-only)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 data-start="1497" data-end="1523">Test account + cleanup</h3>
<ul data-start="1524" data-end="1718">
<li data-start="1524" data-end="1613">
<p data-start="1526" data-end="1613">I’ll use the <strong data-start="1539" data-end="1555">test account</strong> you approved to try Writer’s Block and submit feedback.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1614" data-end="1718">
<p data-start="1616" data-end="1718">When you say <strong data-start="1629" data-end="1643">“conclude”</strong>, the existing cleanup endpoint + admins removal will clear test artifacts.</p>
</li>
</ul>

@[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex with:</p>
<ul data-start="40" data-end="432">
<li data-start="40" data-end="109">
<p data-start="42" data-end="109">Full <strong data-start="47" data-end="60">app build</strong> (current progress + new Writer’s Block module)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="110" data-end="183">
<p data-start="112" data-end="183"><strong data-start="112" data-end="124">BFF Host</strong> feature so “guest” users can interact and leave feedback</p>
</li>
<li data-start="184" data-end="232">
<p data-start="186" data-end="232">Feedback <strong data-start="195" data-end="213">logging system</strong> for later review</p>
</li>
<li data-start="233" data-end="281">
<p data-start="235" data-end="281">ReadMe update so you know how to run/test it</p>
</li>
<li data-start="282" data-end="361">
<p data-start="284" data-end="361">Test account credentials embedded for you &amp; me to access during development</p>
</li>
<li data-start="362" data-end="432">
<p data-start="364" data-end="432">Auto-delete logic for the test account when you say <strong data-start="416" data-end="430">"conclude"</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="434" data-end="614" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Before I do that — do you want me to also make the <strong data-start="485" data-end="520">feedback logs exportable as CSV</strong> so you can pull them into Supabase or Excel later? @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="97">Done! I added a <strong data-start="16" data-end="39">Feedback CSV export</strong> endpoint and packaged a ready-to-run build that includes:</p>
<ul data-start="99" data-end="329">
<li data-start="99" data-end="162">
<p data-start="101" data-end="162">Writer’s Block page with <strong data-start="126" data-end="138">BFF Host</strong> (random avatar prompts)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="163" data-end="209">
<p data-start="165" data-end="209">Feedback logging + <strong data-start="184" data-end="209">admin feedback viewer</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="210" data-end="252">
<p data-start="212" data-end="252"><strong data-start="212" data-end="226">CSV export</strong> at <code data-start="230" data-end="252">/api/export/feedback</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="253" data-end="296">
<p data-start="255" data-end="296">Supabase SQL for all related tables + RLS</p>
</li>
<li data-start="297" data-end="329">
<p data-start="299" data-end="329">README with step-by-step setup</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="331" data-end="448">📦 <strong data-start="334" data-end="347">Download:</strong><br data-start="347" data-end="350">
<strong data-start="350" data-end="448"><span class="" data-state="closed"><a data-start="352" data-end="446" class="cursor-pointer">chapterhouse-bff-feedback-export.zip</a></span></strong></p>
<h3 data-start="450" data-end="471">Quick start (SBS)</h3>
<ol data-start="472" data-end="783">
<li data-start="472" data-end="565">
<p data-start="475" data-end="565">Unzip → copy <code data-start="488" data-end="508">.env.local.example</code> → <code data-start="511" data-end="523">.env.local</code> and paste your Supabase URL + anon key.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="566" data-end="631">
<p data-start="569" data-end="631">Supabase → SQL Editor → run <code data-start="597" data-end="628">supabase/bff_writersblock.sql</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="632" data-end="719">
<p data-start="635" data-end="719">Supabase → Database → <strong data-start="657" data-end="683">Replication (Realtime)</strong> → enable on <code data-start="696" data-end="716">writer_block_posts</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="720" data-end="783">
<p data-start="723" data-end="783"><code data-start="723" data-end="751">npm install &amp;&amp; npm run dev</code> → open <code data-start="759" data-end="782">http://localhost:3000</code>.</p>
